raw_input:
PRODUCT SPEC — NovaPay Digital Savings Account

Product Name: NovaPay SmartSave
Category: Digital Savings & Investment Platform
Launch Date: April 2026
Company: NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (SEBI-registered)

PRODUCT OVERVIEW
NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that automatically sweeps
idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering customers higher returns than
traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

KEY FEATURES
- Auto-sweep technology: balances above ₹10,000 automatically invested in
  SEBI-approved liquid funds
- Instant withdrawal: funds accessible within 30 minutes, 24/7
- Zero lock-in period
- Integrated UPI payments
- Real-time portfolio dashboard

FINANCIAL DETAILS
- Savings account interest: 4% per annum (RBI regulated)
- Liquid fund historical average: 6.5-7.2% per annum (last 3 years, source: AMFI data)
- Minimum balance: ₹1,000
- Auto-sweep threshold: configurable between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
- SEBI registration: INZ000XXXXXX
- RBI banking licence: partnered with SBM Bank India
- All mutual fund investments through AMFI-registered AMCs

TARGET AUDIENCE
- Urban millennials (25-38 years)
- First-time investors
- Salaried professionals seeking passive wealth growth

COMPETITIVE POSITIONING
- Versus traditional FD: higher liquidity, comparable returns
- Versus other neo-banks: automated investment (no manual action needed)

LAUNCH MARKETS
- Phase 1: Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Delhi NCR
- Phase 2: Tier-2 cities (Q3 2026)

blog_post:
**NovaPay SmartSave: A Mobile-First Savings Account for the Digital Era**

NovaPay SmartSave, a mobile-first savings account, is set to revolutionize the way Indians save and invest their money. After months of anticipation, the neo-bank has finally started rolling out its services in four major cities - Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Delhi NCR.

**What Sets NovaPay SmartSave Apart?**

One of the standout features of NovaPay SmartSave is its ability to automatically sweep idle balances into liquid mutual funds, providing customers with a higher return on their savings. According to the product spec, NovaPay SmartSave offers customers higher returns than traditional savings accounts. This means that customers can earn a higher interest rate on their savings without having to actively manage their investments. Historically, liquid funds have offered returns in the range of 6.5-7.2% per annum over the last three years, as per data from the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI) and product spec.

**Partnering with SBM Bank India**

NovaPay SmartSave has partnered with SBM Bank India to provide its customers with a robust and secure banking experience. This partnership not only brings with it the trust and credibility of a well-established bank but also ensures that customers' deposits are insured up to ₹5 lakh, as per the Depositor Insurance Fund (DIF).

**Key Features and Eligibility**

NovaPay SmartSave has a minimum balance requirement of ₹1,000, making it accessible to a wide range of customers. The account is SEBI-registered, ensuring that customers' investments are regulated and monitored by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI). NovaPay SmartSave will be launching in Tier-2 cities in Q3 2026, expanding its reach to more customers.

**Consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing in NovaPay SmartSave.**

hindi_content: NovaPay SmartSave aapki samridhi ko shantiman se badhane ke liye aaya hai! Yah digital bachat khata aapke beech mein utar-chadav wali rashi ko liquid mutual funds mein aatmik roop se nivesh karta hai, jisse aapko adhik laabh milta hai. Iske liye urban millennials aur pehle-waale niveshakon ke liye yah ek aadhar hai. Iska aaranbhik aaveshan 4 shaharon mein hoga - Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad aur Delhi NCR! Koi SEBI-sankhyaithit visheshagya se pahle nivesh karne se pehle parichit hon. #DigitalSavings #FinancialFreedom #PassiveWealth
tamil_content: வருமானத்தை பாசிவ்வாக வளர்க்க விரும்புவீர்களா? நோவாபே சுமார்ட்ஸேவ் இங்கே! இந்த டிஜிட்டல் நிதிக்காக்கல் கணக்கு உங்கள் நிறைநிலை தொகைகளை நீடித்த நீர்ம பங்குச் சந்தைகளில் மேலும் அதிக வருமானத்திற்கு முதலீடு செய்கிறது. நகர்ப்புற மில்லினியர்களுக்கும் முதல் முதலீட்டாளர்களுக்கும் சிறந்தது. 4 நகரங்களில் தொடங்குகிறது - மும்பை, பெங்களூர், ஹைதராபாத் & தில்லி என்.சி.ஆர்! முதலீடு செய்யும் முன் ஒரு செபி பதிவு செய்த ஆலோசகரை உங்கள் பார்வைக்குக் கொண்டு வருங்கள். #DigitalSavings #FinancialFreedom #PassiveWealth
